hero.heading: How Grey Matters
hero.description: A simple, proven 5-step journey that has helped over 5 lakh students achieve their dreams. From consultation to celebration—we're with you every step.

steps.title: Book a Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule a one-on-one session with our expert counselors. We'll understand your goals, assess your current level, and recommend the perfect program for you.

steps.title: Enroll & Get Started
steps.description: Choose your preferred batch timing and enroll in the program. Get instant access to our learning portal with all study materials.

steps.title: Learn with Experts
steps.description: Attend live interactive classes with certified trainers. Practice with unlimited mock tests and get personalized feedback on every assignment.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.description: Monitor your improvement with detailed analytics. Get AI-powered insights and recommendations to focus on weak areas.

steps.title: Achieve Your Score
steps.description: Take the exam with confidence and achieve your target score. Our students consistently outperform with an average improvement of 2+ bands.

features.title: Live Interactive Classes
features.description: Not pre-recorded videos. Real-time interaction with expert trainers.

features.title: Doubt Resolution
features.description: 24/7 support via chat, email, and scheduled doubt-clearing sessions.

features.title: Comprehensive Materials
features.description: Curated study materials, practice questions, and exam strategies.

features.title: Certified Trainers
features.description: British Council and Pearson certified trainers with 10+ years experience.

features.title: Flexible Scheduling
features.description: Morning, evening, and weekend batches to suit your schedule.

features.title: Small Batch Size
features.description: Maximum 15 students per batch for personalized attention.

guarantee.title: Score Guarantee Program
guarantee.description: We're so confident in our training methodology that we offer a score guarantee. If you don't achieve your target score, you can retake the course absolutely free.

faqs.q: How long does it take to complete the course?
faqs.a: Our IELTS course is 6-8 weeks, PTE is 4-6 weeks, and Spoken English is 8-12 weeks. However, you can extend access if needed.

faqs.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faqs.a: All our classes are 100% live and interactive. However, recordings are made available for revision purposes.

faqs.q: What if I miss a class?
faqs.a: You can access the recording of missed classes. We also offer make-up classes for important sessions.
Yes, comprehensive study materials, practice tests, and resources are included in all our courses at no extra cost.
